llm_eval.notes: py_compile OK and runnable; clear single responsibility (read-only inventory + JSON write) with reasonable function split. Defects: no # /// script frontmatter block (docstring only, axis5); read_text has no try/except so an unreadable SKILL.md raises uncaught; generated_at is a hardcoded stale literal '2026-05-18' instead of an actual timestamp. Hand-rolled frontmatter parser is fragile but bounded.
